You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. description: Porsche Palm Springs is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2026 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring Dressed in an evocative Oak Green Metallic Neo and with just 12 miles to its name, this vehicle is a testament to the potent combination of motorsport precision and understated sophistication that Porsche embodies.   The 911 GT3 Touring is the purists expression of Porsche performance, blending track-bred engineering with timeless design. Finished in striking Oak Green Metallic Neo, this example is elevated by Front Fascia Airblades in Exterior Color and Exclusive Design Taillights for a seamless aesthetic. Motorsport Stripe Decals on Top in California Gold and the PORSCHE Logo Decal on Side in California Gold create a distinctive, heritage-inspired presence. Wheels Painted in High Gloss California Gold further amplify its visual drama, while HD-Matrix Design LED Headlights in Black and the Exclusive Design Fuel Cap complete the bespoke exterior specification.     Step inside and the Black interior delivers a focused, driver-centric environment crafted for enthusiasts. Folding Lightweight Bucket Seats provide exceptional lateral support, complemented by Seat Belts in Silver Grey for a refined contrast. The Roof Lining in Race-Tex underscores the GT3s motorsport pedigree, while Rear Seats add an element of practicality rare in this segment. Ambient Lighting, Under Door Puddle Light Projectors, and the BOSE Surround Sound System enhance comfort and sophistication without compromising the Tourings purist intent.    Engine and Performance: At the heart of this mechanical masterpiece lies a naturally aspirated 4.0-liter boxer 6 engine, producing a thrilling 502 horsepower and 331 lb-ft of torque. Paired with a precise 6-speed manual transmission and rear-wheel drive, the 911 GT3 Touring delivers an unfiltered and deeply engaging driving experience. Porsche Ceramic Composite Brakes (PCCB) with Calipers in Yellow provide exceptional stopping power and reduced unsprung weight, while the Front Axle Lift System enhances everyday usability. The Chrono Package with Porsche Design GT Clock sharpens performance capability, and the Extended Range Fuel Tank (22.1 gal.) ensures extended driving enjoyment between refueling stops.     Key Features:     Porsche Ceramic Composite Brakes (PCCB): Motorsport-derived braking performance with reduced weight and exceptional fade resistance.    6-Speed Manual Transmission: A pure, driver-focused connection delivering precise and engaging gear changes.    Chrono Package with Porsche Design GT Clock: Performance timing features paired with an iconic dash-mounted timepiece.    Folding Lightweight Bucket Seats: Track-inspired seating engineered for optimal support and reduced mass.    HD-Matrix Design LED Headlights in Black: Advanced illumination technology with a distinctive, aggressive appearance.   Front Axle Lift System: Practical ride-height adjustment for navigating inclines and road obstacles with confidence.     This 2026 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring is far more than just a car; it is the embodiment of Porsches unwavering commitment to naturally aspirated performance, precision engineering, and timeless design. Available at Porsche Palm Springs, this extraordinary Touring model invites you to experience the raw emotion of a manual GT3 refined for the open road.         Porsche Palm Springs is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. Our dealership features a beautiful Porsche Corporate Identity showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and Porsche accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. description: With an original MSRP of $86,550, this 2026 BMW X6 delivers bold coupe-inspired design, advanced technology, and performance-driven engineering in a luxury SUV platform. Finished in striking Manhattan Green Metallic, this X6 stands out with its sculpted profile, aggressive stance, and distinctive BMW presence.  Equipped with the $1,650 M Sport Pro Package, this X6 features enhanced performance and styling elements including the M Sport Exhaust System for a more aggressive sound profile, M Sport Brakes with blue calipers for improved stopping power and visual impact, Extended Shadowline Trim, and M Shadowline Lights that give the vehicle a darker, more athletic appearance. The $1,800 22-inch M Dual Spoke Black Wheels further elevate its commanding road presence and complement the coupe-like silhouette.  The $1,700 Premium Package enhances comfort and convenience with upscale interior amenities and advanced technology features, while the $2,000 Climate Comfort Package adds heated and ventilated front seats along with additional climate enhancements designed for year-round driving comfort. Remote Engine Start adds everyday convenience, allowing the cabin to be pre-conditioned before entry.  Technology is highlighted by BMW Live Cockpit Pro, which integrates a fully digital instrument cluster with a large central display for navigation, media, and vehicle settings, along with seamless Apple CarPlay connectivity. The Harman Kardon Premium Sound System delivers rich, immersive audio throughout the cabin.  For added confidence and convenience, this X6 includes the Parking Assistance Package with Parking Assistant Pro, utilizing advanced sensors and camera technology to simplify parking and low-speed maneuvering. A rear view camera further enhances visibility when reversing. description: This  Ebony Twilight Metallic 2026 GMC Terrain AWD Denali with 5,800 miles has the style and comfort to fit your lifestyle!    No Accidents!   One Owner!    This vehicle is equipped with:  Preferred Equipment Group 5SB  Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back! You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: Porsche North Houston is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2026 Porsche 911 Targa 4 GTS. Dressed in an evocative GT Silver Metallic and with just 268 miles to its name, this vehicle is a testament to the potent combination of high performance and sophistication that Porsche embodies.   The 911 Targa 4 GTS stands as a beacon of design and performance, its GT Silver Metallic exterior beautifully contrasted by the iconic Targa bar and Black Cabriolet Roof. SportDesign Side Skirts, Exclusive Design Taillights, and an Exclusive Design Fuel Cap enhance its athletic stance, while the Front Axle Lift System and Power Steering Plus ensure everyday usability matches its dynamic character.     Step inside and the Leather Interior in Black/Bordeaux Red greets you with unmistakable Porsche craftsmanship. Adaptive Sport Seats Plus (18-way) with Memory Package provide exceptional comfort and support, complemented by a Heated GT Sport Steering Wheel in Leather. The 930 Leather Package, Interior Trim Inlays in Leather with Light Silver accents, and Center Console Lid with Model Designation elevate the cabins bespoke feel. Ventilated Front Seats, BOSE Surround Sound System, Porsche Crests on Headrests, and Under Door Puddle Light Projectors complete the refined yet performance-focused interior.    Engine and Performance: At the heart of this Targa 4 GTS lies a 3.6-liter twin-turbocharged flat-six engine producing 473 horsepower and 420 lb-ft of torque. Paired with Porsches 8-speed Porsche Doppelkupplung (PDK) transmission and advanced all-wheel drive system, this GTS delivers rapid acceleration with precise control. Adaptive Cruise Control, Lane Change Assist, and Remote ParkAssist further enhance confidence behind the wheel, making this 911 equally thrilling and practical.     Key Features:     Premium Package with Remote ParkAssist:  Includes Lane Change Assist (LCA), Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), Ionizer, and BOSE Surround Sound System for elevated comfort and convenience.    Adaptive Sport Seats Plus (18-way):  Performance-inspired seating with personalized comfort memory settings.    Front Axle Lift System:  Adds practicality by raising the front suspension when needed.    SportDesign Side Skirts:  Enhance the dynamic and aggressive profile.    Ventilated Front Seats:  Deliver added comfort in warmer conditions.    930 Leather Package:  Extends premium leather coverage for a truly luxurious cabin finish.     This 2026 Porsche 911 Targa 4 GTS is far more than just a car; it is the embodiment of Porsches commitment to precision engineering, open-air exhilaration, and everyday luxury. Available at Porsche North Houston, it invites you to experience GTS performance with unmistakable Targa style.         Porsche North Houston is a member of the indiGO Auto Group and has received the highly coveted Porsche Premier Dealer status. Our dealership features a beautiful Porsche Corporate Identity showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detailing department, and Porsche accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade-in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email porscheofnorthhouston@eleadtrack.net , or drop by our location at 13911 North Freeway (I-45N) on the northside of Houston. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. description: 2013 Lexus LS460 Sedan (4.6L V8, RWD, ~87k miles) - Available now at Collierville Auto Center!Flagship full-size luxury sedan with elegant, understated designrefreshed spindle grille, sleek LED headlights, chrome accents, and a long, flowing profile that exudes timeless sophistication and quiet authority. The opulent cabin seats five in supreme comfort: premium leather upholstery (heated/ventilated front seats), wood trim, dual-zone (or four-zone) climate control, intuitive infotainment with navigation options, Mark Levinson audio potential, power rear sunshade, and a serene, whisper-quiet interior with generous legroom and trunk space (18 cu ft). Powered by a naturally aspirated 4.6L V8 delivering 386 hp and 367 lb-ft of torque, it provides effortless, silky acceleration (0-60 mph around 5.4-5.7 seconds), linear power delivery, and that smooth V8 refinementpaired with an 8-speed automatic for seamless, quick shifts and rear-wheel-drive balance for composed, engaging handling and a plush ride (adaptive variable suspension often equipped). Fuel economy is respectable for the class at about 16 city/24 highway/19 combined mpg. Towing capacity is limited but adequate for light loads. At 87k miles, the 1UR-FSE V8 is renowned for exceptional durability and longevity (many examples easily surpass 200k-300k+ with regular maintenance), with fewer major issues than some luxury peersthough typical higher-mileage notes include potential control arm bushings/wear (front suspension refresh around 90k-150k), brake actuator concerns (rare but pricey if it fails), minor oil leaks (valve covers), sunroof rattle (easy DIY seal fix), or electronics glitcheswell-maintained ones remain incredibly reliable, luxurious daily drivers with outstanding long-term value and that legendary Lexus build quality.Ready to indulge in flagship-level comfort, smooth V8 performance, and enduring luxury at this sweet mileage spot? Stop by Collierville Auto Center today at 651 W Poplar Ave, Collierville, TN 38017, to check out our full inventory of quality pre-owned vehicles. description: This vehicle has been in our care since 8200 miles. Our customer was very diligent on maintenance and repair and is only breaking ties with this car due to retirement and for something new. This car served him very, very well. Tons of details listed on the expansive Carfax. Most recently, this car had 4 BRAND NEW tires installed, a 4 wheel alignment performed, BRAND NEW rear brakes, rots and calipers as well as a brake fluid flush. PA inspection and emissions valid until 11/26 !!! BRAND NEW oil and filter change, Consistent fluid and filter maintenance performed either on time or ahead of schedule for almost its' entire life. Very economical ride, boasting 33 mpg highway and city combined. Front brake have 80% life left, there are no leaks, no odd smells or noises, no warning lights on the instrument cluster. Car goes down the road straight and quietly. Well optioned with everything needed and more. Perfect for so many uses, either way, a great addition to your fleet.  Don't delay because at this price point, we don't expect it to last very long. As always, contact us with any questions you may have or to arrange a test drive. Vehicle purchase includes a 6 month, 6000 mile powertrain only warranty. Please see the attached options sheet of all of the included equipment on this car.We own an automotive repair facility in Blue Bell, Pennsylvania. Often times our customers for one reason or another decide to sell their vehicles and offer them to us. Following our review we will then purchase the vehicle, send it through our shop, recondition the vehicle to bring it up to optimum standards, detail the vehicle inside and out and re-sell it. This is a fine example of one of those vehicles. All of our technicians are ASE certified and our reputation is stellar in the Montgomery County, Pennsylvania area. Feel free to Google us (Motorcar Makeovers) to check out our credentials and customer reviews. description: 2013 Chevrolet Equinox LT  Description (English)  This 2013 Chevrolet Equinox LT is powered by a 2.4L inline-4 engine producing 182 hp and 172 lb-ft of torque, paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission. The LT trim offers a balanced mix of comfort, convenience and safety features as factory-equipped, and this particular vehicle is in excellent overall condition.  Factory-equipped features (typical for the LT trim): - Powertrain and driving: 2.4L I4 182 hp / 172 lb-ft with a 6-speed automatic transmission. Front-wheel drive is standard, with all-wheel drive available as a factory option on many vehicles. - Safety and chassis: Antilock brakes (ABS), electronic stability control, traction control, front and front-seat side airbags, full-length side curtain airbags, and tire pressure monitoring system (TPMS). Child seat LATCH anchors are provided in the rear seating area. - Exterior: Mid-level LT styling with body-color mirrors and bumpers, roof rails for carrying cargo, and alloy wheels (commonly 17-inch on LT models). Halogen headlamps and integrated rear wiper are standard. - Seating and interior: Comfortable five-passenger seating with durable cloth upholstery and a 60/40 split-folding rear seat to expand cargo capacity. Tilt-and-telescoping steering wheel and adjustable head restraints are included. - Climate and comfort: Manual air conditioning and vents for driver and front passenger; many LT models include automatic climate control as a factory option or on higher equipment packages. - Convenience and controls: Power windows and door locks, remote keyless entry, power mirrors, cruise control, and steering-wheel mounted audio and phone controls for convenient operation. - Infotainment and connectivity: AM/FM radio with CD player, auxiliary input and USB port, Bluetooth hands-free phone and audio streaming capability, and steering-wheel audio controls. Many Equinox LTs also include satellite radio readiness and available upgraded audio packages. - Storage and cargo: Split-folding rear seat, under-floor storage in the cargo area on some models, multiple cupholders and door-panel pockets for everyday practicality. - Additional factory features: OnStar telematics with a trial subscription, engine immobilizer and remote trunk release where equipped.  Note: Exact factory equipment can vary by production options and packages. The vehicle described here has been inspected and is in excellent overall condition.  2013 Chevrolet Equinox LT  Descripción (Español)  Este Chevrolet Equinox LT 2013 está equipado con un motor de 4 cilindros en línea 2.4L que entrega 182 hp y 172 lb-ft de torque, acoplado a una transmisión automática de 6 velocidades. La versión LT ofrece un equilibrio entre confort, conveniencia y seguridad en su equipamiento de fábrica, y este vehículo en particular se encuentra en excelente estado general.  Equipamiento de fábrica (típico de la versión LT): - Tren motriz y conducción: Motor 2.4L I4 con 182 hp y 172 lb-ft, con transmisión automática de 6 velocidades. La tracción delantera suele ser la configuración estándar; la tracción en las cuatro ruedas (AWD) estuvo disponible como opción de fábrica en muchas unidades. - Seguridad y chasis: Frenos antibloqueo (ABS), control electrónico de estabilidad, control de tracción, bolsas de aire frontales y laterales delanteras, bolsas de cortina de largo completo y sistema de monitoreo de presión de neumáticos (TPMS). description: Discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and versatility with this 2014 MINI Cooper Countryman Base. This dynamic crossover SUV is ready to elevate your driving experience and turn heads wherever you go. The 1.6L I4 DOHC 16V engine, paired with a 6-Speed Automatic Steptronic transmission, delivers a responsive and efficient driving experience, with an impressive EPA-estimated 25 MPG in the city and 30 MPG on the highway. The 6-speaker audio system, with AM/FM radio and CD player, ensures your favorite tunes accompany every journey. Dual-zone automatic climate control, power windows, and remote keyless entry add to the vehicle's exceptional comfort and convenience.  Safety is paramount, and this MINI Cooper Countryman is equipped with a suite of advanced features, including traction control, brake assist, electronic stability control, and a comprehensive airbag system. The speed control, power door mirrors, and tilt/telescoping steering wheel further enhance the driving experience.  With its spacious and versatile interior, the MINI Cooper Countryman is ready to accommodate your lifestyle. The 60/40 split-folding rear seat and generous cargo space allow you to adapt to your needs, whether you're embarking on a weekend getaway or tackling your daily errands.  This exceptional 2014 MINI Cooper Countryman Base is a true testament to the brand's commitment to performance, style, and innovation. description: Looking for a whip that's as stylish and speedy as it is reliable? Feast your eyes on this white 2015 Subaru WRX STI - a turbocharged powerhouse that's here to take your driving experience to the next level! Picture yourself gripping the sport leather steering wheel as you effortlessly shift through the gears of the 6-speed close-ratio manual transmission marveling at the symphony of power and precision that only a DOHC Intercooled High Boost engine can deliver. The full-time all-wheel-drive ensures maximum traction on any surface while the sport-tuned suspension and limited-slip differential keep you glued to the road with every twist and turn. As you cruise in this street-legal rally car you'll appreciate the comfort of the performance-design heated front seats complete with embossed STI logos and a sleek interior trimmed in carbon fiber accents. Dual-zone automatic air conditioning keeps you cool no matter how hot the competition gets while the advanced audio system and 2 LCD monitors ensure that you're always entertained on the go. But that's not all - safety is a top priority in this WRX STI with features like side impact beams airbags galore a rearview camera and even rear child safety locks ensuring that you and your passengers are always protected. Plus with the Carfax report available for your peace of mind you can hit the road with confidence and style. Whether you're tearing up the track or just cruising around town this 2015 Subaru WRX STI is sure to turn heads and leave a lasting impression wherever you go. description: Welcome to Hood Automotive, where we have been doing business the right way since 1929. We take pride in delivering dependable vehicles, clear communication, and a customer experience that feels as comfortable as home.  This 2019 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT Texas Edition is a true workhorse, built to handle any task you throw its way. Boasting a powerful EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine and an 8-speed automatic transmission, this truck delivers impressive performance and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 17 city/23 highway mpg.  - SERVICE RECORDS AVAILABLE! - BED LINER - RUNNING BOARDS! - TOWING PACKAGE - TEXAS EDITION - MAX TRAILERING PACKAGE - WHEELS, 20" X 9" PAINTED ALUMINUM - 5.3L V8 (EcoTec3) ENGINE - CAJUN RED TINTCOAT EXTERIOR  The Texas Edition package takes this Silverado to the next level, adding premium features like a locking rear differential, the Trailering Package, and exclusive Texas Edition badging. With the Max Trailering Package, you'll have the confidence to tow your biggest toys, thanks to the enhanced cooling, revised shock tuning, and heavier-duty components.  Inside, the Silverado's spacious and well-appointed cabin provides a comfortable and connected driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of dual-zone automatic climate control, remote start, and the Chevrolet Infotainment 3 system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration. The heated front seats and steering wheel will keep you cozy on those chilly mornings, while the rear-view camera and integrated trailer brake controller make maneuvering and towing a breeze.  Whether you're tackling tough jobs or hitting the open road, this 2019 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT Texas Edition is ready to take on any challenge. Come experience the power, capability, and premium features that make this truck a standout in its class. description: The 2016 Honda Accord Touring is a remarkable vehicle that stands out for its performance, safety features, and advanced technology. With a powerful 3.5L V-6 i-VTEC engine that delivers 278HP and a 6-speed automatic transmission, this car is designed for both power and efficiency.   One of the most impressive aspects of the Accord Touring is its commitment to safety, featuring lane departure prevention. This system helps keep you within your lane by taking corrective action if it detects unintended lane drifting, ensuring a safer driving experience for you and others on the road. Additionally, the forward collision mitigation system is a game-changer; it prepares the vehicle and its occupants for impending impacts, significantly reducing the chances of accidents.  The 2016 Accord Touring also boasts pedestrian impact prevention technology. This innovative feature constantly monitors the road for pedestrians and can take necessary steps to avoid a collision, showcasing Hondas dedication to safety.   In terms of convenience, the smart device mirroring feature allows you to control your smartphone through the vehicles infotainment system. This integration is designed to keep your focus on the road while still accessing your favorite apps and functions. The rear camera further enhances safety by providing a clear view of obstacles behind you, making reversing a breeze.  Additionally, the adaptive cruise control feature takes highway driving to the next level by maintaining a safe distance from the vehicle ahead, allowing you to relax on long trips. The brake assist system is a crucial safety feature that enhances stopping power during emergency situations, ensuring that you can react quickly when necessary.  The voice-activated integrated navigation system is another standout feature, providing hassle-free directions to your destination without the need for cumbersome maps. Plus, the key fob engine start control allows you to start your vehicle remotely, ensuring its comfortable and ready when you are.  In summary, the 2016 Honda Accord Touring is the perfect blend of performance, safety, and advanced technology. With features like lane departure prevention, forward collision mitigation, and smart device mirroring, it truly embodies Hondas commitment to driver safety and convenience. Experience the difference with the Accord Touring and enjoy a driving experience that is both sophisticated and enjoyable.  Our dealership is your top choice for quality vehicles, serving Irvine, Riverside, San Bernardino, Yorba Linda, Anaheim Hills, and Corona with a vast selection and exceptional customer service. description: 2016 Toyota 4Runner SR5 Premium 4WD is a midsize sport utility vehicle (SUV) built for both everyday driving and rugged off-road capability. Its part of Toyotas 5th-generation 4Runner lineup, known for durability, strong resale value, and proven reliability.? Engine & Performance-   Engine: 4.0-liter V6 gasoline engine-   Horsepower: ~270 hp-   Torque: ~278 lb-ft-   Transmission: 5-speed automatic-   Drive System: Part-time Four-Wheel Drive (4WD)-   Towing Capacity: Up to 5,000 lbs-   Off-Road Capability: Nearly ~9.6-inch ground clearance, hill start assist & hill descent control available? Interior & Comfort-   Comfortable seating with power front seats-   Heated front seats available-   Optional third-row seat for extra passengers (in some models)-   Entune Audio Plus with multimedia touchscreen, Bluetooth, USB/AUX & navigation-   Steering wheel-mounted controls and tilt/telescoping wheel-   Power moonroof/sunroof with sunshade? Technology & Connectivity-   6.1 touchscreen display (with navigation on Premium)-   Bluetooth wireless connectivity-   USB and auxiliary inputs-   Satellite radio (SiriusXM)-   Backup camera with projected path-   Voice recognition and hands-free phone operation? Convenience Features-   Remote keyless entry-   Power windows and door locks-   115-volt cargo area outlet-   Cargo tie-downs and ample storage-   Rear privacy glass and roof rails-   Tow hitch receiver standard? Safety-   4-wheel ABS brakes-   Traction control & stability control-   Multiple airbags (front, side, curtain)-   Hill start assist and vehicle skid control-   Rearview backup camera Fuel Economy & Dimensions-   MPG: ~17 city / 21 highway-   Fuel Capacity: 23 gallons-   Length: ~190.2-   Width: ~75.8-   Height: ~71.5-   Seating Capacity: Up to 7 (with third row)-   Cargo Volume: ~47.2 cu ft behind second row-   Ground Clearance: ~9.6? What SR5 Premium MeansThe SR5 Premium trim builds on the base SR5 by adding more comfort, convenience, and tech features, such as:-   SofTex® leatherette interior-   Power moonroof-   Navigation & upgraded audio-   Heated seats-   Premium connectivity options? Why People Like ItOwners and reviewers often praise the 4Runner SR5 Premium for its:-   Rugged reliability and strong resale value-   Comfortable interior plus useful tech features-   Good balance of description: The 2017 Honda Accord Sport is a remarkable vehicle that blends style, performance, and safety features seamlessly. This model is equipped with a 2.4L I-4 gasoline direct injection engine, delivering an impressive 189 horsepower paired with a 6-speed manual transmission, making it both powerful and efficient.One of the standout features of the Accord Sport is its **rear camera**, which provides enhanced visibility of the area behind the vehicle, ensuring you can safely navigate tight spaces and avoid hazards. This feature acts as an extra set of eyes, providing peace of mind while driving.Safety is a priority with the **brake assist** system, which detects panic braking and applies maximum braking power to help prevent accidents. This technology allows drivers to react swiftly in critical situations, ensuring a safer driving experience.Long drives become much more enjoyable with **cruise control and steering wheel-mounted controls**. Set your desired speed and let the vehicle maintain it, reducing fatigue and improving fuel economy during road trips. You can relax and focus on the journey ahead.Comfort is paramount in the Accord Sport, with multiple adjustable features for the drivers seat. The **power reclining driver seat** allows you to find the perfect angle for comfort, while the **power 2-way lumbar support** alleviates strain on your lower back. Additionally, **power height adjustment**, **fore/aft adjustment**, and **cushion tilt** ensure that each driver can achieve their ideal driving position.The vehicle is also equipped with **dual-zone front HVAC controls**, allowing both the driver and front passenger to set their individual temperature preferences for maximum comfort.In terms of performance, the Accord Sport features **variable valve timing** and a **DOHC** setup, which enables efficient operation at various RPM levels. This results in improved fuel efficiency and cleaner emissions, making it an eco-friendly choice without sacrificing power.For tech enthusiasts, the **wireless audio streaming** feature provides easy access to your favorite music and podcasts through the vehicles sound system without the hassle of cords.Finally, the **ignition immobilizer** ensures that your vehicle stays secure, preventing theft and giving you peace of mind wherever you go.Overall, the 2017 Honda Accord Sport is a well-rounded vehicle that offers an excellent combination of performance, comfort, and advanced safety features, making it a fantastic choice for any driver.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Front Wheel Drive,Power Steering,ABS,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,Brake Assist,Aluminum Wheels,Tires - Front Performance,Tires - Rear Performance,Temporary Spare Tire,Power Mirror(s),Rear Defrost,Intermittent Wipers,Variable Speed Intermittent Wipers,Rear Spoiler,Daytime Running Lights,Automatic Headlights,Fog Lamps,AM/FM Stereo,MP3 Capability,Steering Wheel Audio Controls,Bluetooth Connection,Auxiliary Audio Input,CD Player,MP3 Capability,Bluetooth Connection,Power Driver Seat,Bucket Seats,Driver Adjustable Lumbar,Pass-Through Rear Seat,Rear Bench Seat,Adjustable Steering Wheel,Trip Computer,Power Windows,Leather Steering Wheel,Keyless Entry,Power Door Locks,Remote Trunk Release,Cruise Control,Climate Control,Multi-Zone A/C,A/C,Cloth Seats,Leather Seats,Driver Vanity Mirror,Passenger Vanity Mirror,Driver Illuminated Vanity Mirror,Passenger Illuminated Visor Mirror,Floor Mats,Power Windows,Power Door Locks,Trip Computer,Security System,Immobilizer,Traction Control,Stability Control,Traction Control,Front Side Air Bag,Tire Pressure Monitor,Driver Air Bag,Passenger Air Bag,Front Head Air Bag,Rear Head Air Bag,Passenger Air Bag Sensor,Child Safety Locks,Back-Up Camera

Floor & Cargo Mats (5-Piece Set)  Boasting an impressive 31 city/39 highway MPG, this Versa Note delivers exceptional fuel economy, allowing you to enjoy the open road without constantly worrying about your next fill-up. The 1.6L 4-cylinder DOHC 16V engine, paired with a smooth-shifting CVT with Xtronic, provides a responsive and efficient performance that will have you eagerly anticipating every drive.  The exterior of the Versa Note is adorned in a stunning Blue hue, exuding a sense of sophistication and style. Step inside, and you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior, featuring Upgraded Cloth Seat Trim that combines comfort and style. The intuitive controls and user-friendly technology, including the AM/FM/CD Audio System, Steering Wheel Mounted Audio Controls, and more, ensure a seamless and enjoyable driving experience.  Safety is of the utmost importance, and this Versa Note delivers with features such as Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, ABS Brakes, and Electronic Stability Control. These cutting-edge safety systems work tirelessly to protect you and your passengers, giving you the peace of mind you deserve.  Versatility is also a hallmark of the Versa Note, with a Split Folding Rear Seat that allows you to easily accommodate larger items or extra passengers. The 15" Steel Wheels with Full Wheel Covers add a touch of refined style, complementing the overall sleek and modern design.  This 2017 Nissan Versa Note SV is a true gem, offering an exceptional blend of style, efficiency, and functionality. description: The 2018 Ford F-150 SuperCrew Cab XLT delivers proven toughness, smart technology, and everyday comfort in a full-size truck built to handle it all. Inside the spacious SuperCrew cabin, youll find dual power seats, air conditioning, power windows and door locks, keyless entry, and remote engine start for modern convenience. The tilt and telescoping steering wheel, cruise control, and smooth power steering make long drives comfortable and effortless. Technology keeps you connected with SYNC, AM/FM stereo, CD/MP3 playback, SiriusXM Satellite, Bluetooth wireless, parking sensors, and a backup camera for added confidence behind the wheel. Safety and stability are built in with AdvanceTrac electronic stability control, traction control, hill start assist, ABS four-wheel braking, an alarm system, and a full suite of dual front, side, and F&R head curtain air bags. Strong, dependable, and well-equipped, the 2018 Ford F-150 XLT SuperCrew blends capability, comfort, and advanced features into one impressive full-size pickup. Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
